title: triticum aestivum f. creticum
intro: Triticum aestivum f. creticum, also known as Cretan durum wheat or emmer wheat, is a subspecies of emmer wheat (Triticum dicoccum or Triticum turgidum subsp. dicoccoides) with a distinct genetic makeup. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Triticum aestivum f. creticum include lowering cholesterol levels, reducing blood pressure, and improving digestion, as well as having anti-cancer and anti-diabetic properties. Herbal preparations of Triticum aestivum f. creticum can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules, and are often used to support cardiovascular health and alleviate symptoms of diabetes and certain cancers.
